title: pleurothallis pazii
intro: Pleurothallis pazii is a species of orchid, specifically a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the leaves of the Pleurothallis pazii plant have been used in folk medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and infections. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as dried and used in topical applications to harness their medicinal properties.
